title: Smoked Dutch Turkey Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoked turkey, Dutch vegetables, and intense spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked turkey breast and cook until browned on all sides.
Remove the turkey from the pot and set aside.
Add the Dutch onions and cook until they start to soften.
Add the Dutch carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Pour in the intense beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Return the smoked turkey to the pot and reduce the heat to low.
Simmer the stew for 20-25 minutes, or until the turkey is cooked through.
Season with intense spices, salt, and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
